title: Tu Khub Mane Game Che
lyrics:
Tun khoob mane game chhe, mara vhala prabhu! Mara dilman tun rame chhe, kamanagara prabhu! Joi tara nayano, man ghelu banyu, Chupkethi kahu chhu tane, Love You prabhu!

Tamara darshanathi, rom mara khile, Tamari shital chhaya, bhavobhav jo mile, Jivan karu samarpan, kahu Thank You prabhu! Tun khoob mane game chhe, mara vhala prabhu! Mara dilman tun rame chhe, kamanagara prabhu!

Nath! Mara pamva tujane, buddhine thayo chhe vhem, Koine nahin kahesho tame, bas hun janu chhu kem, Chahu chittathi prabhuji tane, jem rajul chahe nem, Dhabakyu hruday jota tane, thayo paheli najare prem,

Sapnaman avi ja, tujane yad karu, Upakaro karya te ananta, pal pal samaru, Bhini ankheti kahu chhu, tane Miss You prabhu! Tun khoob mane game chhe, mara vhala prabhu! Mara dilman tun rame chhe, kamanagara prabhu!

Rachna: Param Pujya Muni Dhananjay Vijayji M. S.

title: Taro Sathvaro
lyrics:
Taro ne maro, sambandh nyaro,
Mane yaad avashe, taro sathvaro

Tara roop upar hu, o vaari jaau,
Tara gunonthi, anjai jaau,
Bas tagar magar thai, hu jovu tujne,
Jad aakhi duniya, mali gai mujne
Dubato hato ne, malyo kinaro
Mane yaad avashe, taro sathvaro

Tara milannani, je kshano hati aa,
Muj janmara ni, shubh palo hati aa,
E kshano hruday ma, kandaari lidhi me,
Aatamni sheri, shangaari lidhi me,
Vasamo dhano chhe, aa viyog taro
Mane yaad avashe, taro sathvaro

title: Rome Rome Girnar
lyrics:
Nem nem nem nem nem
Nem nem nem vhaala nem..(2)
Mara rome tun girnar, mara shvaase tun neminath..(2)
Maro aadhaar tun, moksh daatar tun...
Maro sathvaar tun, maro pagathar tun...
Mukti tanun sarnamun tun, haiyaano dhabkar tun...
Rome rome girnar gunje shvaase shvaase
Shvaase shvaase neminath biraje rome rome...

title: Ant Chhe Anant Nahi
lyrics:
Sarv svikarni sanyam yatra, saadi anant chhe vire kahi,
Bhav bhamanoni yatra no to, ant chhe anant nahi...
Hun kaheto nathi sansare dukh, pan shaashvat sukh no ansh nahi,
Bhav bhamanoni yatra no to, ant chhe anant nahi...
Paisa pachhal bhav jase, saath na aavse pai,
Svarth bharela sambandho chhe, prabhu sang karile sagai.
Tun bhav ananta kari aavyo, tun nashvar deh pachhal bhaagyo,
Jeevanma sukh je kotare chhe, mrugajal bani te chhetare chhe,
Kem man mandir taaru khaali chhe? Kem khaali aatam? Sukh nahi,
Bhav bhamanoni yatra no, to ant chhe anant nahi...
Hun kaheto nathi sansare dukh, pan shaashvat sukh no ansh nahi,
Bhav bhamanoni yatra no to, ant chhe anant nahi...
Nemi nun bas naam jape, banse nem jem e man mere,
Deh thi anjan chhe man ranjan, chhodya ene dhan kanchan,
Aa nemi to girnari chhe, ene raajul raani taari chhe,
Vali pashuone pan ugaari re, eto paamya shivvadhu pyaari re,
Punya nahi jose e tarun, bas man pavitra chhe ke nahi,
Bhav bhamanoni yatra no to, ant chhe anant nahi...

title: Rajpath Mashup
lyrics: Veer vachano par vishvas kari, aa vishyaone hun thukravaun chun, Berangi aa sansar tyajine, rajpathnaan range rangavaun chun... Tane vandan lakhon lakhon, tane vandan lakhon lakhon, Hamari bhini chhe aankhon, tane vandan lakhon lakhon... Rajpath par janara, tene vandan amara, Rajnandan amara, tane vandan amara, Tane vandan amara... tene vandan amara... Ho kalyugnan sitara, tene vandan amara, Rajpath par janara, tene vandan amara... Hun kaaik chun e bhamana chhe, enathi dukhvo bamana chhe, Bas hun chun evi matra chhe, tyaan sarv svikarni yatra chhe, Bas anand chhe anand chhe uyan, lesh matra sanklesho nahi, Bhav bhamanoni yatraao to, ant chhe anant nahi... Sarv svikarni sanyam yatra, sadi anant chhe vire kahi, Bhav bhamanoni yatraao to, ant chhe anant nahi... Swami tamaro thaine jivish, vachan aapu tamne, Tage amara thaine rahesho, vachan aapo amne... Viratinaan veshno je shanngar dhare, Rajpathnaan panthno je svikar kare, Rang sansarno, sang parivaarno.. je tyaje, je tyaje.. Veer aana dhari, bhukti aabhushine.. je saje, je saje.. Rang vairagyano, shobhe chhe tyagano, Jene chhodyaa chhe sukho tamam, Lakhsne aambva, mokshne pamva, Rajpathni maandi chhe yatra, Chhodi ne chalya re vairagi, ajabni chhe eni khubgari... Rajpathno, vishman jay jaykar ho... Hun maangun paramno path, mara sanyam manorath, Mane laagi sanyamni radh, mare javun rajpath, Guru aananaaan lai shapath, mara sanyam manorath, Jaagi gayo... jaagi gayo re... Veerna thaine varas, veer banvani chhe aas, Virati vesh laine, bhalathi tarvani chhe pyas, Satva elun jaagi gayun, marun man vairagi banyun, Aatam maro muktipathne kyare varshe? Rajpath kyare malashe? Rajpath kyare malashe? Kyare malashe? Kyare malashe? Kyare malashe? Shubham bhavah, shreyo bhavah, mangal bhavah, kalyanam bhavah Sadhu jivankee khubsurati men, ho... Sadhu jivankee khubsurati men, Manado...Oss... Manado...Oss... Manado laago re laago re virati men, Manado laago re laago re virati men... Malashe ogho, bhav tarak dukhkharta, Na koi bijun, aa bhavman sukhkarta, Haiyathi gaay badhan, ne bhina thaay badhan, Aaje rudan sankalpo, honsheti gahe badhan, Vandho re... vandho re... rajoharnane vandho re.. bhaav dhari aanandho re.. Diksharthi amar raho, jinashasanano jayjaykar... Rajpathno jayjaykar... Sanyamnaan bhaavni karone pariksha, Sanyamnaan veshni karun hun pratiksha, Mare to levani levani chhe diksha... Levani levani levani chhe diksha... Jena palan pagalathi, dharati dhabkar kare, Ne veer prabhuno vesh dhari, sanyam shangar kare, Devo pan sadhu jilno... Jayjaykar kare, jayjaykar kare... Sansarno raag todi, vitraagni rahe dhodi, Bhuktinaan range minjaava, pivo negno virati ras, Virati..virati..virati...virati ras..virati ras... Raaj..raaj..raaj...rajpath..rajpath...

title: Dosh Thi Haryo
lyrics:
Dosh thi haryo bharyo chun chhataan,
Dada tujne malavani ghani aash chhe, hun tane nirakhi shakun na bhale,
Dada tun parantu mari aas paas chhe
Dosh thi haryo bharyo chun chhataan,
Dada tujne malavani ghani aash chhe
Bhale tun koyal na gaane, bhale tun granth na paane,
Mane tun aavi ne malaje,
O dada koi pan bahaane,
Jal badha pi lidha aa vishva na,
Dada tujne pivani haji pyaas chhe
Vasyo tun dharati gagan maan, vasyo tun sundar madhuvan maan,
Vasyo tun maha ane sant maan,
Chhataan shanti nathi maan maan,
Drashti gochar tha have tun vishva maan,
Dada tuj vina ahi sahi niraash chhe
Hun ne marun ne mara ma, ej vaato mane game,
Bija na gun tani saragam,
Hruday maan khub re dame,
Hun tana samudra maan dubi gayo,
Tari paase aavi ek laash chhe

title: Raja Aapo Have Dada
lyrics:
Raja aapo have dada amari vaat thai puri adhuri vaat chhe
Toye aa mulakat thai puri
Amaari vaat thai puri
Karya kaaman tame aeva ame tara bani betha, tamari
Preet ma ghayal ame ghela bani betha, tame aadhar thai
Betha ame laachar thai betha,
Amaari vaat thai puri..... (1)
Tame sarita tani lahero tame saagar ghano gahero,
Tamara smit na pushpo ane zakal bhino chahero, tamara
Mukh ne joyu...have fariyaad thai puri
Amaari vaat thai puri..... (2)
Smaran taaru hanmesh de, maran taane samadhi de,
Rahe nirlepta sukh ma, ane dukh ma dilaso de, fakt jo
Aatlu aapo amaari maangani puri,
Amaari vaat thai puri..... (3)
Uday vinve chhe kar jodi fari aavish hu dodi, zukavi
Aankh ne amathi raja aapo havve thodi, javanu man
Nathi thatu, amari aaj majburi
Amaari vaat thai puri...... (4)
Divao saav bujya tel khutyu raat thai puri,
Amaaro kanth thakyo gaan thambhyu vaat thai puri,
Amaari vaat thai puri......
Tame mokshe jai betha ame sansaar lai betha...
Amaari vaat thai puri......
Adhuri vaat thai puri madhuri vaat thai puri
Amaari vaat thai puri.....
Raja aapo have dada

title: Nemras
lyrics:
Sansar thi virti rath no, Girnar thi Mukti path no..(2),
Sathvaar che ek maro, aadhar che ek bas...
Nem.. Nem.. Nem.. Nemras..(4)
Nem tu maro prem che, sopyu tane aa jivan,
Joi tane pehlij shane, Mohayu che maru maan,
Girnari brahmchari, Jau tuj par hu oo vari,
Mukti no vesh dhari, raajimati banu tari,
Bharthar tu rehje maro, bhavo bhav ni che taras,
Sathvaar che ek maro, aadhar che ek bas...
Nem.. Nem.. Nem.. Nemras..(4)
Girnar tu ee bhumi che, jyaa shiv varya jiv anant,
Arihant siddh muni tarya, dhanya banya sadhu sant,
Nemi no hath jhali, banu hu prasham vratdhari,
Revat no sath pami, have banvu muktigami,
Prabhu nem to giri hem no, mare banvo che varas,
Sathvar che ek maro, Aadhar che ek bas...
Nem.. Nem.. Nem.. Nemras..(4)

title: Nishfal Amaru Jeevan
lyrics:
Ogha ananti vaar mai lidha, saghda gaya ae nishfal, G - C - D - G 
Aa var prabhuji tara sahare, moh ne karshu nirbal.. G - C - DAG
Nishfal amaru jeevan -  G C D G
aa bhogo, ni pachad , vahe che , bhagwant C G Am D G

Tara vachan par shraddha mari, kem kare che halchal,
Gunma j sukh che, ne dosho ma dukh che, samje na man maru pagal.. nishfal...

Panch prahar no swadhyay karjo, aape kidhu harpal,
pan man amaru, kevu Chanchal, ninda vikatha pachad.. nishfal...

title: Tara Mast Gulabi Gaal
lyrics:
Tara mast gulabi gal, tari ankhvo chhe aniyali... Rudhiyana raja mara, tun krushna hun radha tari...
Dilman jage spandan, bhina bhina nayan, Jane aa paheli mulakat, Vahal karu tane, chumio bharu tane, Bhari dhau prabhu tujane bath, O nath chhe maro tun, pan lage chhe dhostari... Man morali vagado to, tun krushna hun radha tari...
Ankhoman ansu chhe, jane chomasu chhe, Ave chhe prabhu mane tari yad, Milannani talaveli, hathman tari hatheli, Jhankhvu chhu ek prabhu taro sath, Hun rajimati tari, he nem! Prabhu girnari... Maro prem svikaro to, tun krushna hun radha tari...
Rachna: Pu. Panyas Dhananjay Vijayji MS

title: Vahala Antariksha Dada, Bolo Be Ghadi
lyrics:
Antariksha man anant shaktio chhe, aane enathi anantgani shaktio antariksha dada tara ma chhe. Bahar thi joie ne to tu andar kaid chhe em loko kahe chhe, pan andar tari bajuthi joie ne to Bahar te amane badhane kaid rakhya chhe ne evu amane lage chhe. Kai pan bhul thai hoy to mafi mangu chhu Ghadi ghadi, haive toradi de ne janjiro ni kadi, ane bol ne kaik be ghadi.
Chhute bhale pranon pan dada aa chhute nahi, ruthe bhale duniya sari, Mande bandhani ne tande gunthani, dada keri pritadi, Vahala antariksha dada, bolo be ghadi..(2) Have rahevano na, jaju sahevano na Aa, bas karo ne sajani... vahala...
Sahuna dilo man aaje, dard bharya chhe thodi, hamdardin to batao, Ankhe aansuuda na, dhodh vahya chhe tame, have to kai bhinjao, Aansu kehata re aa to eni, suno re jara to Eto, jure chhe jari re jari... vahala...
(Antariksha sahune pyaro, antariksha sahuthi nyaro Antariksha kamanagaro, chalo antarikshaji...)
Rato ni rato, karato rahu vato evu, kahe dil no dhabakaro, Koi kahe pagalapan ni chhe bhato eni, kai nathi re parva to, Taro maro re nato tute na kada to Evi, ghumavido jadui chhodi.... vahala...
Rachna: Pujya Muni Shri Shramanhanss Vijayji Ma. Sa.
